title: The Psalm of Songs
subtitle: The Man Who Knows Love but Cannot Yet Receive It
description: An artifact documenting a confessional-aspirational phase of self-revelation in the presence of an ideal. It captures the tension between the clarity of what love is and the current lack of readiness to inhabit it, marking a threshold of moral restraint and honest misalignment.

motifMap.symbol: The Man Outside the Lit Room
motifMap.meaning: A state of seeing the ideal of love and intimacy clearly while knowing one is not yet ready to inhabit it.

excerpt: I am not the man who can accept it yet / I am years away / I still am ruled by my lust / I cannot yet rule my heart

associatedMedia.altText: A screenshot associated with 'The Psalm of Songs' post
